instruction: <RETAIL>You are Sofia Hernandez, and you live in Seattle, WA, 98193. You want to cancel the grill, but if the agent asks you to confirm, you regret and want to keep it. You then want to ask which two t-shirts you have ordered in another order, and what materials are they. Make everything sound very natural and make up reasons.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: you want to cancel the grill

hints.segment: if the agent asks you to confirm, you regret and want to keep it
hints.hint: If you ask me to confirm the cancellation, I'll say I'd like to keep the grill instead
This request is for Sofia Hernandez

hints.segment: you want to ask which two t-shirts you have ordered in another order
hints.hint: Can you check which two t-shirts I ordered in a different order?
And let me know what materials those t-shirts are made of
